name: Nuix Limited
analysis: NXL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 58% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.4050, stop A$1.3068, target A$1.5550 (1.53:1) — then trail it.
